name: Screenshoot
author: tr0z
description: Press a key to stitch every camera in the current room into one seamless full-room screenshot. Unlike naive stitchers, each pixel comes from exactly one camera (the nearest that covers it), so there is no doubling or ghosting where cameras overlap. Captures the full scene (creatures, player, weather) with the HUD hidden. Hotkey, output folder and quality are configurable in the Remix menu.
